# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:7.10.2
    environment:
      - node.name=es01
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - discovery.type=single-node
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash-oss:7.10.2
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
    volumes:
      - ./logstash:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana-oss:7.10.2
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - "ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200"
  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server-oss:7.10.2
    environment:
      - "APM_SERVER_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
volumes:
  esdata:
